title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (only CC update)
scenario: Charge case-only DFU shows correct "Houston" progress screen when earbuds are placed into the case during update
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure your earbuds and charge case are connected.
3. Initiate a 1-step Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the Charge Case (CC) only.
4. Wait for the CC update to progress past 20%.
5. While the CC update is in progress (over 20%), place the earbuds into the charge case.
6. Observe the screen displayed on the app.
expected: The app displays a "Houston" screen (a progress/status screen) indicating the charge case firmware update is in progress.
